### In Preparation

1. Roque, N. A. (in preparation). Protecting ourselves from AI-enabled financial fraud: The case for the family password.
1. Roque, N. A. , & Santos, A. (in preparation). A taxonomy of screen-time interventions.
1. Roque, N. A., Shaleha, R., & Brick, T. (in preparation). Exploring risk factors for medication errors in daily life: A mixed methods study.
1. Roque, N. A., Hall, C., Garcia De La Garza, A., & Katz, M. (in preparation). What one extra monitor can reveal: A case study on local air quality dynamics.
1. Roque, N. A. (in preparation). Screen time isn’t all bad: A natural language analysis of how we measure it.
1. Roque, N. A. (in preparation). Particulate matter 2.5 (PM2.5) air pollution exposure is associated with ambulatory cognitive assessment (ACA) performance: Results from the Einstein Aging Study.
1. Roque, N.A. Privacy and Safety in Online Research: Challenges and Opportunities. Target Journal: Behavior Research Methods. [**Premier Journal in Behavioral Research**]
